content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Arbostar: Sales Team Lead Anywhere in the World Ontario Sales Management, Sales Pitching, Team Management, and Sales Analytics Sales and Marketing Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5196/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Canada <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://arbostar.com/">https://arbostar.com/</a> </p> <p>ArboStar is a fast-growing SaaS platform helping tree care and landscaping companies streamline operations across North America. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a Sales Team Lead to organize, lead, and develop our sales team while ensuring consistent performance and predictable growth.<br>This role is focused on team leadership, performance management, and enablement, with the expectation that the&nbsp;<strong>Sales Team Lead</strong>&nbsp;stays close enough to execution to effectively support team results when needed. You’ll report to the Director of Sales and work closely with Marketing, Implementation, and Customer Success to ensure a strong and consistent client acquisition experience.</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Team Leadership &amp; Organization</li> <li>Lead, organize, and scale the sales team to meet growth targets.</li> <li>Own hiring, onboarding, and ramp-up of new sales representatives.</li> <li>Define clear roles, responsibilities, and expectations across the team.</li> <li>Build and maintain sales playbooks, scripts, and documented processes.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Coaching, Training &amp; Quality Assurance</strong></p> <ul> <li>Provide ongoing coaching, feedback, and performance improvement plans.</li> <li>Run regular call reviews, QA sessions, and one-on-one coaching.</li> <li>Ensure high and consistent quality across cold calls, discovery calls, demo confirmations, and demos.</li> <li>Identify skill gaps and address them through targeted training and enablement.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Performance Management &amp; Reporting</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own team-level performance metrics and reporting (pipeline health, activity, conversion rates, revenue).</li> <li>Conduct regular performance reviews for individual reps and the team.</li> <li>Document performance trends, risks, and improvement actions.</li> <li>Be accountable for team results, with compensation tied to the team meeting defined performance criteria.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Supporting Sales Execution</strong></p> <ul> <li>Spend time reviewing and shadowing sales reps, particularly during the first months in the role, to understand workflows, strengths, and gaps.</li> <li>Step in selectively to support sales activities when it directly helps team performance (e.g., onboarding periods, coverage gaps, or complex opportunities).</li> <li>Reinforce best practices by example, without owning a permanent individual quota or day-to-day rep responsibilities.</li> <li>Use hands-on involvement to inform coaching, process improvements, and training—not as the primary focus of the role.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Partner with Marketing to improve lead quality and funnel performance.</li> <li>Work closely with Implementation and Customer Success to ensure smooth handoffs and aligned expectations.</li> <li>Share customer feedback and market insights to improve messaging and sales strategy.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You’ll Bring</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in B2B SaaS sales.</li> <li>Experience leading, mentoring, or managing sales representatives.</li> <li>Strong understanding of the full sales cycle and modern sales processes.</li> <li>Proven ability to coach and improve individual and team performance.</li> <li>Comfort managing performance, accountability, and difficult conversations.</li> <li>Data-driven approach to sales metrics and reporting.</li> <li>Excellent communication and organizational skills.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with CRM systems (HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive).</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to Have</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in the landscaping, arbor, or field services industries.</li> <li>Background in fast-growing or scaling SaaS companies.</li> <li>Experience building onboarding or training programs.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We Offer</strong></p> <ul> <li>Competitive base salary + team-performance-based bonus.</li> <li>Fully remote role with flexibility across North American time zones.</li> <li>Opportunity to lead and shape a growing sales team.</li> <li>Direct impact on company growth and sales operations.</li> <li>The chance to work in the green industry, helping tree care and landscaping businesses operate more efficiently while supporting healthier urban forests and a more sustainable planet.</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/arbostar-sales-team-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/arbostar-sales-team-lead</a></p> Mon, 18 May 2026 15:04:55 +0000 Wed, 17 Jun 2026 15:04:55 Customer Support Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://fairgambling.com">https://fairgambling.com</a> </p> <h1>Casino Management &amp; Operations</h1><p></p><p><strong>About us – FairGambling</strong> We're a fast-growing platform in the online gaming space. Not a casino ourselves, but the layer on top of it: we review, compare, and analyze operators across the industry, with transparency as the whole point. A lot of what we cover happens onchain, so we don't take operator numbers at face value – we verify them. Player reviews are checked against real on-platform activity, not just star ratings. The goal is simple: give players the honest picture the industry usually doesn't.</p><p><strong>The role</strong> This is a broad, hands-on role for people who really know the iGaming industry. The title is intentionally open: we have multiple areas to cover and we'd rather meet strong industry people first and place them where they fit best. Junior and ambitious people are very welcome – we're happy to grow the right person into it.</p><p><strong>What you'll do:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Coordinate casino-related content and reviews, working closely with writers and researchers</p></li><li><p>Own our operator database – keep it accurate, current, and well-organized</p></li><li><p>Handle ongoing operations, updates, and escalations</p></li><li><p>Manage affiliate relationship
